title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates:
Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree Asia Pacific Associates!
